text.message: Just hoping none of y’all are griefers

As soon as I do, I will
Especially once they get port they’ll cook

blue has my numbers but better and you're targeting me
thought game said you ported for a wheat not an ore
If you had told me I would have robbed blue for sure
Red I will move the robber for an ore trade
Was just about to ask if you needed wheat haha
Black you’ll have to do that
I’m not even a threat anymore
Great, and he traded with red who can win now lmao
